rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.112, which governs the housing finance division's annual budget preparation. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: On or before August 1 of each year, the director shall file with the board a proposed annual budget for the housing finance division for the succeeding fiscal year.
_note: No conflict; the rule cited concerns housing finance division budgeting, not property tax homestead exemptions.
